onboardingTasks.title: Create First Submission
onboardingTasks.description: Submit data using your form to see the submission workflow in action

guide.title: How to Create Your First Submission
guide.description: Learn how to submit data using your custom form and track its progress through the workflow.

steps.title: Navigate to Submissions
steps.description: Click on the 'Submissions' tab in the top navigation bar to access the submissions page.

steps.title: Click 'New Submission'
steps.description: Look for the 'New Submission' button in the top-right corner and click it to open the submission form.

steps.title: Fill Out the Form
steps.description: Complete all required fields in the submission form. Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*).
tips: Make sure all required fields are filled in
Double-check your data before submitting
You can save drafts if you need to come back later

steps.title: Submit Your Data
steps.description: Click the 'Submit' button at the bottom of the form to create your first submission.
tips: You'll receive a confirmation once the submission is successful
The submission will appear in your submissions list

onboardingTasks.title: Add First Form
onboardingTasks.description: Create your first canonical form to start collecting data

guide.title: How to Create Your First Form
guide.description: Learn how to build a custom form to collect the exact data you need for your workflow.

steps.title: Access Form Builder
steps.description: Navigate to the Forms section from the main menu to access the form builder.

steps.title: Create New Form
steps.description: Click 'New Form' button and enter a name and description for your form.

steps.title: Add Form Fields
steps.description: Use the form builder to add fields. Drag and drop field types from the left panel to your form.
tips: Start with basic fields like text, email, and phone
Mark required fields appropriately
Add helpful descriptions to guide users

steps.title: Configure Field Settings
steps.description: Click on each field to configure validation rules, default values, and field properties.

steps.title: Save and Publish
steps.description: Save your form and publish it to make it available for submissions.
tips: Test your form before publishing
You can always edit the form later

onboardingTasks.title: Setup Company Profile
onboardingTasks.description: Define your organization identity and operational metadata

guide.title: How to Setup Your Company Profile
guide.description: Configure your company information to personalize your platform experience and enable advanced features like automatic website data extraction.

steps.title: Navigate to Company Settings
steps.description: Click on 'Settings' in the top navigation, then select 'Company' from the settings menu.

steps.title: Enter Company Information
steps.description: Fill in your company name, description, and other basic information.
tips: Use your official company name
Add a clear description of your business

steps.title: Add Your Company Website URL
steps.description: Enter your company website URL in the designated field. Our platform will automatically scan your website to extract relevant information.
tips: Enter the full URL including https://
Make sure the URL is accessible publicly
The scan may take a few moments to complete

steps.title: Review Extracted Data
steps.description: Once the website scan completes, review the automatically extracted information such as company description, logo, and contact details.
tips: You can edit any extracted information
Add missing information manually
Update information that needs correction

steps.title: Save Your Profile
steps.description: Click 'Save' to store your company profile. You can always update this information later.
tips: Keep your company information up to date
Return to this page anytime to make changes

steps.title: Return to Tasks
steps.description: Click on the 'Tasks' button in the navigation to return to your task list and continue with onboarding.
